notes: 将本 JSON 作为 Dify 页面中的环境变量 COMMAND_LIBRARY_JSON 的值。它不是 Windows agent 本地配置。后续新增命令时，优先在 commands 数组中追加。长篇说明和背景知识放知识库。

commands.title: 主机域角色探测
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$cs = Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem; [pscustomobject]@{ ComputerName = $cs.Name; Domain = $cs.Domain; PartOfDomain = $cs.PartOfDomain; DomainRole = $cs.DomainRole; DomainRoleText = switch ($cs.DomainRole) { 0 {'StandaloneWorkstation'} 1 {'MemberWorkstation'} 2 {'StandaloneServer'} 3 {'MemberServer'} 4 {'BackupDomainController'} 5 {'PrimaryDomainController'} default {'Unknown'} } } | Format-List"
commands.purpose: 判断当前机器是否已加入域、是否为域控制器

commands.title: AD 工具可用性探测
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ad = Get-Module -ListAvailable ActiveDirectory | Select-Object -First 1 Name, Version, Path; $rep = Get-Command repadmin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $dcd = Get-Command dcdiag -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [pscustomobject]@{ ActiveDirectoryModuleInstalled = [bool]$ad; ActiveDirectoryModulePath = if ($ad) { $ad.Path } else { $null }; RepadminAvailable = [bool]$rep; DcdiagAvailable = [bool]$dcd } | Format-List"
commands.purpose: 检查 Active Directory PowerShell 模块、repadmin、dcdiag 是否可用

commands.title: NTDS 服务探测
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$svc = Get-Service -Name NTDS -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($svc) { $svc | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType, DisplayName } else { Write-Error '未发现 NTDS 服务。当前主机大概率不是域控制器。'; exit 3 }"
commands.purpose: 判断当前主机是否具备域控核心服务

commands.title: 域控制器基本信息
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-Module -ListAvailable ActiveDirectory) { Import-Module ActiveDirectory; Get-ADDomainController -Filter * | Select-Object Name, IPv4Address, OperatingSystem, Site, IsGlobalCatalog, IsReadOnly } else { Write-Error 'ActiveDirectory PowerShell 模块不可用。请先安装 RSAT-AD-PowerShell 或在域控制器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 列出所有域控制器及其状态
commands.output_hint: Name, IPv4Address, OperatingSystem, Site, IsGlobalCatalog, IsReadOnly

commands.title: AD 域信息
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-Module -ListAvailable ActiveDirectory) { Import-Module ActiveDirectory; Get-ADDomain | Select-Object DNSRoot, DomainMode, PDCEmulator, RIDMaster, InfrastructureMaster } else { Write-Error 'ActiveDirectory PowerShell 模块不可用。请先安装 RSAT-AD-PowerShell 或在域控制器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 获取域模式和核心角色信息

commands.title: AD 林信息
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-Module -ListAvailable ActiveDirectory) { Import-Module ActiveDirectory; Get-ADForest | Select-Object ForestMode, RootDomain, SchemaMaster, DomainNamingMaster, GlobalCatalogs } else { Write-Error 'ActiveDirectory PowerShell 模块不可用。请先安装 RSAT-AD-PowerShell 或在域控制器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 获取林模式和全局编录信息

commands.title: AD 复制摘要
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$rep = Get-Command repadmin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($rep) { & repadmin /replsummary } else { Write-Error 'repadmin 不可用。请在域控制器或已安装 AD DS/RSAT 工具的服务器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 检查 AD 复制摘要
commands.output_hint: 复制延迟、失败数量、目标 DC

commands.title: DCDiag 全量检查
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$dcd = Get-Command dcdiag -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($dcd) { & dcdiag /v /c /e } else { Write-Error 'dcdiag 不可用。请在域控制器或已安装 AD DS/RSAT 工具的服务器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 对所有域控运行完整诊断
commands.output_hint: 各项测试结果与错误信息

commands.title: 禁用用户账户
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-Module -ListAvailable ActiveDirectory) { Import-Module ActiveDirectory; Get-ADUser -Filter {Enabled -eq $false} -Properties LastLogonDate, WhenCreated | Select-Object Name, SamAccountName, LastLogonDate, WhenCreated, DistinguishedName } else { Write-Error 'ActiveDirectory PowerShell 模块不可用。请先安装 RSAT-AD-PowerShell 或在域控制器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"

commands.title: 锁定用户检查
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-Module -ListAvailable ActiveDirectory) { Import-Module ActiveDirectory; Search-ADAccount -LockedOut | Select-Object Name, SamAccountName, LastLogonDate } else { Write-Error 'ActiveDirectory PowerShell 模块不可用。请先安装 RSAT-AD-PowerShell 或在域控制器上执行该命令。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 检查当前被锁定的 AD 用户

commands.title: DNS 区域列表
commands.shell: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-Command Get-DnsServerZone -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Get-DnsServerZone | Select-Object ZoneName, ZoneType, DynamicUpdate, IsReverseLookupZone, IsDsIntegrated } else { Write-Error 'DnsServer 模块或 DNS 服务器工具不可用。'; exit 2 }"
commands.purpose: 检查 DNS 区域配置

commands.title: Exchange 服务器清单
commands.shell: Get-ExchangeServer | Select-Object Name, ServerRole, Edition, AdminDisplayVersion, Site
commands.purpose: 列出 Exchange 服务器基础信息

commands.title: Exchange 健康报告
commands.purpose: 获取 Exchange 健康报告
commands.output_hint: 健康状态、失败项、组件名称

commands.title: Exchange 组件状态
commands.shell: Get-ExchangeServer | ForEach-Object { Get-ServerComponentState -Identity $_.Name | Select-Object @{N='Server';E={$_.Identity}}, Component, State }
commands.purpose: 检查 Exchange 服务器组件状态

commands.title: 邮箱数据库状态
commands.shell: Get-MailboxDatabase -Status | Select-Object Name, Server, EdbFilePath, DatabaseSize, AvailableNewMailboxSpace, MasterServerOrAvailabilityGroup, Mounted, LastFullBackup, LastIncrementalBackup
commands.purpose: 检查邮箱数据库挂载和备份状态
commands.output_hint: Name, Server, DatabaseSize, Mounted, LastFullBackup, LastIncrementalBackup
